text: [COMPETE] CSS selector parser alongside grap: support >> [role=button][name=Save] syntax for external users, grap remains internal power syntax
[COMPETE] Scenario step expect + recovery: Action-Expect-Recovery pattern per step, auto-retry with recovery handler before failing
[COMPETE] Experience DB sharing: export/import mechanism for community app profiles (like DirectShell vision of shared configs)
[COMPETE] Rust performance evaluation: benchmark UIA enumeration .NET vs Rust, consider native module for hot paths

[BUG] ValuePattern.Value read-back empty/stale after SetValue on Windows 11 Notepad RichEditD2DPT — expect value_contains fails immediately after successful set_value. ReadElementValue returns old content. Likely RichEditD2DPT caches Value or doesn't implement GetValue properly. Workaround: use TextPattern for doc content instead of ValuePattern.

[FEATURE] a11y close shared close-all helper: 'wkappbot a11y close {proc:X} --all --show-dialogs' — first runs find to list target windows + detect modals, prompts user-style output before actual close. Avoids the user-Notepad session-restore trap.

title: [CHORE] old notebook data recovery from previous sessions
text: [CHORE] old notebook data recovery from previous sessions
rootCause: Duplicate entries across DG-WKAppBot and DGWCS-WKAppBot.CLI origins — same recovery task. Copy suggestions.jsonl + experience/ from backup to current hq.

title: [CHORE] public repo checklist before going public
text: [CHORE] public repo checklist before going public
rootCause: Duplicate across origins — audit committed files for secrets/PII, strip hq data from tracking, scrub commit history, finalize LICENSE/README/AGENTS before public release.

title: [BUG] Korean argv CP949 corruption from Bash (3 fix options: CommandLineToArgvW / --from-file / --stdin)
text: [BUG] Korean argv CP949 corruption from Bash (3 fix options: CommandLineToArgvW / --from-file / --stdin)
rootCause: Git Bash UTF-8 argv reinterpreted as CP949 by CreateProcessA on Korean Windows

[BUG] win-click coordinate system ambiguous. Docs say x y relative to window-title-matched window, but observed behavior: passing absolute screen coords (107, 1373) and window-relative coords (15, 1089) BOTH return rc=0 but neither hits intended button. Workaround: undocumented; trial and error. Fix: (a) add --abs flag for explicit absolute screen coords, (b) document client vs window vs screen coord choice, (c) log resolved click coords (post-transform) for debugging.

title: [BUG] screenshot action ignores params.path + target.class_name
rootCause: Playbook screenshot action neither honors params.path for output file nor target.class_name for window selection
estimatedWork: Wire params.path into screenshot output path; resolve target.class_name through WindowFinder before capture

title: [FEATURE] Add read + shell actions to playbook engine
text: [FEATURE] Add read + shell actions to playbook engine
rootCause: Playbook has 20 actions but no read (UIA/OCR text extraction) or shell (external command run); blocks end-to-end scenarios that need verification reads or pre/post-steps
estimatedWork: Implement ReadAction (delegates to A11yCommand.Read) + ShellAction (AppBotPipe.StartTracked wrapper); add schema entries
